perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco store where a young woman in a black top is holding a box of pastries and smiling at the camera. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the pastry boxes on display shelves, highlighting the 'Blueberry Blossom Pastry' labels. (3) The setting shifts to an indoor living room/studio where the same woman and a friend are seated at a table with plates and the opened pastry box. (4) They tear the pastries apart to show the blueberry filling, taste them, and react with excited expressions and thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An offscreen male voice asks 'Why are you smiling like this?' over upbeat, fast-tempo background music. (2) A female voice narrates the product details, including the price of 339 TWD for 6 pieces. (3) The audio becomes a dialogue between two females as they taste the food, describing the texture as flaky and the sweetness as balanced. (4) The music remains consistent and high-energy until the end, concluding with the two women shouting '10 points!' in unison.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '你為什麼笑成這樣' (Why are you smiling like this?) with a playful tone. (3) Functional Text: '超級黑馬 藍莓果醬奶酥' (Super dark horse: Blueberry Jam Cream Crisp) appearing with flame effects. (4) Functional Text: '339元 6個' and '10分!!!' indicating price and high rating.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product information -> Detailed tasting and review at home -> Final rating

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in red in the background, 1 blurred passerby.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair wearing a black sheer-sleeved top; the other wears a white shirt and a black beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is shot in a warehouse-style supermarket (Costco) with refrigerated shelves; the second half is a domestic indoor setting with a clean wall and dining table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and natural domestic light.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a positive recommendation for a specific Costco Taiwan bakery item by demonstrating its appearance at the store and conducting a detailed taste test to validate its quality and value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, price mentioning, and extremely high rating (10/10).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful captions and 'Dark Horse' labeling style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'influencer shopping' format common on social platforms like Douyin or Instagram Reels, focusing on high-value-for-money items.
